_meta.shape: Mirrors SBIR.gov /public/api/solicitations response. Used in tests/test_t24h_gate.js so calibration runs without a live API call.

solicitation_topics.topic_title: Off-road perception and traversability for unmanned ground vehicles
solicitation_topics.topic_description: Develop autonomous ground perception and traversability estimation for robotic combat vehicles, including off-road autonomy in DDIL environments.

solicitation_topics.topic_title: Onboard rendezvous and proximity operations decision provenance
solicitation_topics.topic_description: Trustworthy AI decision provenance for onboard space domain awareness and rendezvous proximity operations.

solicitation_topics.topic_title: Edge fusion for kill web composability
solicitation_topics.topic_description: Open topic broad agency announcement seeking edge computing data fusion enabling kill web composability across CJADC2.

solicitation_topics.topic_title: Attestable inference for autonomous decisions in DDIL environments
solicitation_topics.topic_description: Verifiable AI attestation infrastructure for autonomous decisions in DDIL environments. Data fusion verification and ai governance required.

solicitation_topics.topic_title: Respirators with rapid-deployment chemical agent detection
solicitation_topics.topic_description: Respirator hardware with chemical detection for biological agents and pharmaceutical countermeasures.
